sdg1_oecdpov.label: Poverty rate after taxes and transfers (%)

sdg2_stunting.label: Prevalence of stunting in children under 5 years of age (%)

sdg2_wasting.label: Prevalence of wasting in children under 5 years of age (%)

sdg2_mdd.label: Minimum dietary diversity among children aged 6-23 months (%)

sdg2_obesity.label: Prevalence of obesity, BMI ≥ 30 (% of adult population)

sdg2_trophic.label: Human Trophic Level (best 2-3 worst)
sdg2_trophic.source:
Bonhommeau et al. (2013) 
data updated to 2017

sdg2_crlyld.label: Cereal yield (tonnes per hectare of harvested land)

sdg2_yieldgap.label: Yield gap closure (% of potential yield)

sdg2_pestexp.label: Exports of hazardous pesticides (tonnes per million population)

sdg3_neonat.label: Neonatal mortality rate (per 1,000 live births)
sdg3_neonat.source: UN Inter-agency Group for Child Mortality Estimation

sdg3_u5mort.label: Mortality rate, under-5 (per 1,000 live births)
sdg3_u5mort.source: UN Inter-agency Group for Child Mortality Estimation

sdg3_hiv.label: New HIV infections (per 1,000 uninfected population, all ages)

sdg3_ncds.label: Age-standardized death rate due to cardiovascular disease, cancer, diabetes, or chronic respiratory disease in adults aged 30 to 70 years (%)

sdg3_pollmort.label: Age-standardized death rate attributable to household air pollution and ambient air pollution (per 100,000 population)

sdg3_fertility.label: Adolescent fertility rate (births per 1,000 females aged 15 to 19)

sdg3_births.label: Births attended by skilled health personnel (%)

sdg3_vac.label: Surviving infants who received 2 WHO-recommended vaccines (%)

sdg3_uhc.label: Universal health coverage (UHC) index of service coverage (worst 0-100 best)

sdg3_swb.label: Subjective well-being (average ladder score, worst 0-10 best)

sdg3_region.label: Gap in life expectancy at birth among regions (years)

sdg3_incomeg.label: Gap in self-reported health status by income (percentage points)

sdg3_smoke.label: Daily smokers (% of population aged 15 and over)

sdg4_preprim.label: Participation rate in pre-primary organized learning (% of children aged 4 to 6)

sdg4_literacy.label: Literacy rate (% of population aged 15 to 24)

sdg4_tertiary.label: Tertiary educational attainment (% of population aged 25 to 34)

sdg4_socioec.label: Variation in mathematics performance explained by socio-economic status (%)

sdg5_familypl.label: Demand for family planning satisfied by modern methods (% of females aged 15 to 49)

sdg5_edat.label: Ratio of female-to-male mean years of education received (%)

sdg5_lfpr.label: Ratio of female-to-male labor force participation rate (%)

sdg5_parl.label: Seats held by women in national parliament (%)

sdg5_paygap.label: Gender wage gap (% of male median wage)

sdg6_water.label: Population using at least basic drinking water services (%)

sdg6_sanita.label: Population using at least basic sanitation services (%)

sdg6_freshwat.label: Freshwater withdrawal (% of available freshwater resources)

sdg6_scarcew.label: Scarce water consumption embodied in imports (m³ H₂Oeq/capita)

sdg6_safewat.label: Population using safely managed water services (%)

sdg6_safesan.label: Population using safely managed sanitation services (%)

sdg7_cleanfuel.label: Population with access to clean fuels and technology for cooking (%)

sdg7_co2twh.label: CO₂ emissions from fuel combustion per total electricity output (MtCO₂/TWh)

sdg7_renewcon.label: Renewable energy share in total final energy consumption (%)

sdg8_accounts.label: Adults with an account at a bank or other financial institution or with a mobile-money-service provider (% of population aged 15 or over)

sdg8_unemp.label: Unemployment rate (% of total labor force, ages 15+)

sdg8_rights.label: Fundamental labor rights are effectively guaranteed (worst 0–1 best)

sdg8_impacc.label: Fatal work-related accidents embodied in imports (per million population)
sdg8_impacc.source:
Alsamawi et al. (2017) 
data updated to 2018

sdg8_impslav.label: Victims of modern slavery embodied in imports (per 100,000 population)

sdg8_yneet.label: Youth not in employment, education or training (NEET) (% of population aged 15 to 24)

sdg9_roads.label: Rural population with access to all-season roads (%)
sdg9_roads.source: SDSN (2023), based on Workman, R. & McPherson, K., TRL (2019)

sdg9_lpi.label: Logistics Performance Index: Infrastructure Score (worst 1-5 best)

sdg9_uni.label: The Times Higher Education Universities Ranking: Average score of top 3 universities (worst 0-100 best)

sdg9_articles.label: Articles published in academic journals (per 1,000 population)

sdg9_rdex.label: Expenditure on research and development (% of GDP)

sdg9_patents.label: Total patent applications by applicant's origin (per million population)

sdg9_netacc.label: Gap in internet access by income (percentage points)

sdg9_womensci.label: Female share of graduates from STEM fields at the tertiary level (%)

sdg10_elder.label: Elderly poverty rate (% of population aged 66 or over)

sdg11_slums.label: Proportion of urban population living in slums (%)

sdg11_pipedwat.label: Access to improved water source, piped (% of urban population)

sdg11_urbaccess.label: Urban population with access to points of interest within a 15min walk (%)
sdg11_urbaccess.source: SDSN (2023), based on Nicoletti, L., Sirenko, M., & Verma, T. (2023)

sdg11_transport.label: Population with convenient access to public transport in cities (%)

sdg12_ewaste.label: Electronic waste that is not recollected (kg/capita)

sdg12_pollimp.label: Air pollution associated with imports (DALYs per 1,000 population)

sdg13_co2gcp.label: CO₂ emissions from fossil fuel combustion and cement production (tCO2/capita)

sdg13_co2export.label: CO₂ emissions embodied in fossil fuel exports (tonnes/capita)

sdg13_ecr.label: Carbon Pricing Score at EUR60/tCO₂ (%, worst 0-100 best)

sdg14_cpma.label: Mean area that is protected in marine sites important to biodiversity (%)

sdg14_cleanwat.label: Ocean Health Index: Clean Waters score (worst 0-100 best)

sdg14_fishstocks.label: Fish caught from overexploited or collapsed stocks (% of total catch)

sdg14_trawl.label: Fish caught by trawling or dredging (%)

sdg14_discard.label: Fish caught that are then discarded (%)

sdg14_biomar.label: Marine biodiversity threats embodied in imports (per million population)
sdg14_biomar.source:
Lenzen et al. (2012) 
data updated to 2018

sdg15_cpta.label: Mean area that is protected in terrestrial sites important to biodiversity (%)

sdg15_cpfa.label: Mean area that is protected in freshwater sites important to biodiversity (%)

sdg15_redlist.label: Red List Index of species survival (worst 0-1 best)

sdg15_forchg.label: Permanent deforestation (% of forest area, 3-year average)
sdg15_forchg.source:
Curtis et al. (2018) 
data updated to 2021

sdg16_u5reg.label: Birth registrations with civil authority (% of children under age 5)

sdg16_weaponsexp.label: Exports of major conventional weapons (TIV constant million USD per 100,000 population)

sdg16_justice.label: Access to and affordability of justice (worst 0–1 best)

sdg16_exprop.label: Expropriations are lawful and adequately compensated (worst 0 - 1 best)

sdg17_govex.label: Government spending on health and education (% of GDP)

sdg17_oda.label: For high-income and all OECD DAC countries: International concessional public finance, including official development assistance (% of GNI)

sdg17_govrev.label: Other countries: Government revenue excluding grants (% of GDP)

sdg17_multilat.label: Index of countries' support to UN-based multilateralism (worst 0-100 best)
